nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear. Low around 69, with temperatures rising to around 73 overnight. South southwest wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 100, with temperatures falling to around 98 in the afternoon. North northeast wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 9pm and midnight. Partly cloudy. Low around 68, with temperatures rising to around 71 overnight. North northwest wind 2 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
